provenance.notes: Processed 1 quotes from 2 verse files. Source: HistoricalChristianFaith/Commentaries-Database. License: PUBLIC DOMAIN.

data.author: John of Karpathos
data.quote: Blessed are those who, when grace is withdrawn, find no consolation in themselves but only continuing tribulation and thick darkness, and yet they do not despair. Rather, strengthened by faith, they endure courageously, convinced that they do indeed see him who is invisible.
data.source_title: TEXTS FOR THE MONKS IN INDIA 71
